title: Humboltia imraei

Humboldtia brevipes is a species of flowering plant, also known as the 'Ivory Palm'. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and acting as an antioxidant. The bioactive constituents of the plant include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Humboldtia brevipes include decoctions, infusions, and powders, which are used to treat various health conditions.
